response.justification: Bogdan brings 10+ years of full-stack engineering experience with strong alignment to the primary stack — TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple production roles — and current hands-on work in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, which directly matches the role's AI agent development requirement. His TDD advocacy, cloud and containerization experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), and multi-language background make him a credible senior candidate. The main gap is the complete absence of NestJS, which is a core framework in the primary stack, and neither Vitest nor Playwright appear explicitly in the resume despite testing being a stated requirement.
strengths: Production-grade TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across multiple roles, including high-throughput systems handling millions of HTTP requests
Current hands-on AI agent development work including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Strong testing culture demonstrated through TDD practices, building a custom test runner (Trial), and organizing testing workshops and code katas
concerns: NestJS is entirely absent from the resume despite being a named primary stack requirement
Vitest and Playwright are not mentioned; testing depth is clear but stack-specific framework alignment is unverified
Kotlin is not referenced anywhere, leaving the secondary backend technology requirement unaddressed
